description: News-headline graphic. The full background is a black-and-white photograph of President Trump shot from behind, his arm raised with a clenched fist, facing a large seated audience in a conference hall (recessed ceiling lights visible). A small white White-House mansion logo with 'The WHITE HOUSE' sits at top center. Overlaid near the top on a white rounded card is a red-and-black 'NEW YORK POST' logo and the headline in black: 'Trump rolls out ‘America First’ counterterror strategy targeting cartels, jihadists and domestic extremists,' with the phrase 'targeting cartels, jihadists and domestic extremists' in yellow highlight. The tweet caption is 'America First.'
notable_text: NEW YORK POST: Trump rolls out 'America First' counterterror strategy targeting cartels, jihadists and domestic extremists; The WHITE HOUSE
